# leadingImage

**Instance Property**

The configuration’s image.

## Declaration

```swift
var leadingImage: UIImage? { get }
```

## Discussion

Configurations are immutable. To change or remove the image that the message list item’s leading region shows, create a new configuration and update the list item’s [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMessageListItem/leadingConfiguration] property.

A configuration’s image can’t be larger than [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMaximumMessageItemImageSize]. If you use an animated image, this property returns the first image in the animation sequence.

## Getting the Configuration’s State

- **isUnread**: A Boolean value that determines whether the message list item displays an unread indicator.
